creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #1)
sorry, I reported it, and it just broke again on a different server I am updating as well.


It seems the effort to make FreeBSD a desktop OS is stepping on the toes of legacy headless servers which require the libs for web services.

The libraries are not only used for desktop implimentations.

Kind Regards,
Jason
